title: Monday Expert Needed for Delivery
excerpt:
Hello, 
We are seeking experienced freelancers or white label partners to help us with delivery for Monday.com. If you possess the skills to create custom workflows, dashboards, reports, integrations, and set up accounts…

posts.author: JackM (Jack Michelson )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are seeking experienced freelancers or white label partners to help us with delivery for Monday.com. If you possess the skills to create custom workflows, dashboards, reports, integrations, and set up accounts, we would like to hear from you.

Thank you and have a great day!

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JackM

Sounds like Easy Mondays is exactly what you’re looking for. Drop us an email and we’ll set up a time we can talk about your requirements and what you need from a working relationship.

teameasy@easy-mondays.com
Easy Mondays

posts.author: Rishabh (Rishabh )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JackM,

I saw your requirement and would love to help you with creating custom workflows, reports, integrations, and set up accounts.

Kindly reach out to me via Rishabh@plaxonic.com to discuss more in detail.

Best Regards,
Rishabh

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JackM !

I believe our team at thespelas.com is exactly what you are looking for.

We are experts at creating customized solutions, streamlining our clients’ workflows, building informative dashboards, setting up complex integrations and in general helping our clients implement their full vision and positively expand it.

We would be very happy if you scheduled a call with us here so you can describe your needs and requirements more in detail.

I am looking forward to hearing back from you!

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: Jack, we can help. Sending you a PM

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JackM

You are in the right place to find a specialist to help you with what you need.

My company, Kick Consulting, specialises in custom workflows, dashboards, integrations and everything monday related. We help them get the most from their monday.com set up, optimise workflows and train the team on the new system. Here are some of our client’s testimonials.

We scope your process, design it and implement it for you. You can book the complimentary 60-min intro meeting through here.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Elena
CEO | Founder

posts.author: JackM (Jack Michelson )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Elena,

It sounds like you are an agency. Do you provide white label services?

We are looking for someone to help us out with delivery more like a freelancer. But white label services could also be a viable option.

posts.author: JackM (Jack Michelson )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Giannis,

It sounds like you are an agency. Do you provide white label services?

We are looking for someone to help us out with delivery more like a freelancer. But white label services could also be a viable option.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jack,

Unfortunately we do not provide white label services as we are a monday consulting company.

The services we provide are as described in my previous post, pertaining to helping clients build upon already existing monday solutions or creating new ones.

If this is something that interests you please contact us here .

Best Regards,
Giannis

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JackM
We specialise in monday.com (official channel partner). However, if we recognise there is a better solution out there for what you need we will tell you so. However, we do not implement any other solution. Happy to have a 15-min call to see if our interests align.
E

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JackM,

I would be open to having a discussion with around the white labelling service and helping you with implementation as a viable option for you.

Lets connect and discuss further if you would like another option to consider

posts.cookedHtml:

Welcome to the monday community!

If you are looking for someone who can help you with monday delivery and possess rich prowess in creating custom workflows, dashboards, reports, and set up accounts or integrations, I would recommend you seek help from certified monday.com consultants.
